official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound cookie_request packet fixture
Write the official Configuration clientbound cookie_request body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed cookie_request packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed cookie_request packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded cookie_request key from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the cookie_request body.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundCookieRequestPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundCookieRequestPacket preserves the Identifier key produced by the official fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, key string, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Configuration-to-Play readiness, or Play readiness.
